Item.NetworkXML: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <Packet> <Command>setRequest</Command> <DatabaseManager> <SystemData Dhcp="OFF" IPAdrsLan="" SubnetMaskLan="" GwLan="" MacAddress="" DnsAuto="OFF" DNSPri="" DNSSec="" Dhcp2="OFF" IPAdrsLan2="" SubnetMaskLan2="" GwLan2="" MacAddress2="" DnsAuto2="OFF" DNSPri2="" DNSSec2="" Proxy="OFF" ProxyAddress="" ProxyUser="" ProxyPass="" APNOnOff="OFF" APN="" APNAuthType="NONE" APNUser="" APNPass="" /> </DatabaseManager> </Packet>
